landing.title: Close CRM — The Sales CRM That Does the Work For You
landing.text:
Close CRM — The Sales CRM That Does the Work For You
Product
CRM
Lead Management
Proactively organize, prioritize, and route more leads to close deals faster
Power Dialer & Calling
Built-in power dialer, VoIP, email, and SMS. Call and connect more leads without switching tools. No integrations.
Sales Automation
Automate follow-ups, qualifying sequences, task creation, and lead routing.
Reporting & Coaching
Sales dashboards, leaderboards, and call coaching to improve rep performance
Get Started
Platform Overview
Because action matters: Close is the only sales CRM that doesn't just store your data, it acts on it with calling, email, and AI automation built in.
Customer Stories
See how small businesses and scaling teams grow revenue with Close
Integrations
100+ native, no-code, and Zapier integrations to fit your stack and work the way you want
Pricing
Chloe
Resources
Learn
The Close Blog
Sales strategies, AI sales tips, cold calling scripts, and CRM guides from the experts on closing deals.
Help Center
Easy set up, quickly learn every feature, and get answers fast
Resources Library
Free sales templates, email scripts, and guides that close more deals.
Office Hours
Get expert, hands-on help from the Close team

About

Demo
Try Close
This CRM calls
your leads for you
The moment a lead comes in, it gets called. Qualified. Booked. Before your team even sees it.
Try for free
No credit card required
Chloe is free during Beta.
What is Close?
Close is a sales CRM built for teams that sell. It 
combines calling, email, SMS, pipeline management, 
reporting, and an AI sales agent named Chloe into a 
single platform. Close helps teams act on their sales 
data.
What is Chloe?
Chloe is an AI sales agent built into Close CRM that 
calls leads, qualifies prospects through real 
conversations, and can book meetings while updating 
your CRM automatically. She is part of the CRM — not 
a separate tool or integration.
10,000+
Customers
2B+
Sales Interactions
4.8
G2 Rating
“
Our booked appointments per week have gone up ~50% since Chloe went live.
— Dana Derricks, Founder @ FollowUp.com
Built for conversations.
Now Close runs them, end-to-end.
Calling, SMS, email, and pipeline.
All in one place: working your deals for you.
New lead comes in?
Contacted instantly
A lead hits your pipeline. Chloe calls within minutes — using Close’s built-in dialer. Transcript, notes, and next steps logged automatically.
Start your free trial
Cold lead sitting in your CRM?
Re-engaged automatically
When Chloe finds cold leads she re-opens the conversation and sends warm responses straight to your rep's inbox.
Re-engage cold leads
Your rep forgot to follow-up?
Followed up and moved forward
Chloe instantly writes the follow-up, sends it at the right time, and updates the deal stage so nothing falls through the cracks.
Automate follow-ups
Your lead is now qualified and ready for sales
Handled and routed
Chloe qualified your lead, booked your meeting, assigned the right rep, and now prepped your notes, before the call even starts.
Update your CRM
Slide 3 of 4.
“
We've saved over $100,000 in tech costs switching from Salesforce to Close. We're doing things we never dreamed of doing in a CRM.
— Zac Muir, VP of Revenue @ Sisu
“
"If you're worried your clients will be turned off by AI, don't be — it's just noise. Close and Chloe have done nothing but impact my bottom line in a positive way."
— Ben Pace, President @ ClientMatchmaking.com
Customers can’t stop talking about how much they love Close
Real customers loving Close and Chloe:
Your CRM has all the data.  Now it can act on it.
Chloe turns your pipeline data into calls, follow-ups, and booked meetings. Without your reps even lifting a finger.
Summarized calls
Automatic follow-ups
Updated CRM
Surfaced insights
Every call, captured and summarized
Chloe generates a complete AI summary of every lead — pulling from calls, emails, and meetings. Full transcripts, action items, and key moments are all logged to the CRM automatically
The right message, right on time
Chloe prepares follow-ups based on call transcripts and sends them or queues them for your rep to review.
The CRM that updates itself
Every conversation moves your deal forward. Plus, Chloe fills contact fields with rich data insights from LinkedIn and the web.
Daily action-items
Hot leads waiting for follow-up while other deals stall? Not anymore. Chloe's on top of everything.
“
Chloe's pricing is dramatically cheaper than an SDR, with faster quality control and instant adjustability.
— Jem Millett, Director of Admissions @ Flatiron School
Works with the tools you already use
Close connects to your favorite sales, marketing, and support tools. Out of the box.
See all integrations
Don't take our word for it
Ask AI
about Close
See an unfiltered review of Close before you come back and start your free trial.
Ask ChatGPT
Ask Claude
Ask Perplexity
Prompt copied — open Claude and paste to get started ✓
Like what you heard?
Start a free trial
Built for teams that build
Build on Close
REST API, webhooks, and MCP server.  Everything you need to customize Close for the way your team works.
Explore the developer platform
Stop missing leads. Start closing deals.
The best part of sales is still you. Chloe handles the rest.
“
No matter what business model you’re in, your competition is about to be using this technology.
— Michael Fomkin, CEO & Founder @ VIP Ignite
Start for free
No credit card required. Chloe is free during Beta.

Solo
Essentials
Growth
Scale
Core Features (CRM)
Chloe (AI sales agent)
Calls, qualifies, books, and follows up automatically.
Free in Beta
Free in Beta
Leads
Contacts are defined as individuals within an organization and are attached to a Lead in Close.
Up to 10,000
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited Contacts
Contacts are defined as individuals within an organization and are attached to a Lead in Close.
Opportunity management
Track your Opportunities and view the Total Value and Expected Value of the deals in your pipelines. Up to 300 per lead.
Multi-channel inbox view
Centralize your to-do list to ensure no leads slip through the cracks.
Forms
Capture website leads with a no-code form builder.
Pipelines
Create multiple opportunity pipelines to track different teams, products, or sales processes.
Pipeline Guidance
Pipeline Guidance highlights stalled or at-risk deals and suggests next steps to keep them moving.
Task management
Assign tasks to yourself and others to never miss a next step.
Dynamic list building (Smart Views)
Search, filter, and save customized views of Leads and Contacts and share them with other team members.
Follow-up reminders
Set reminders to follow-up with your contacts.
Data import and export
Import data from another CRM, a spreadhseet, or manually add in data.
Duplicate lead management
Duplicate lead detection on import and ability to merge duplicate leads.
Lead and Contact activity timeline
View, filter, and search all of the activities with a Lead or Contact in a chronological timeline.
API access + event log API
Connect your Close organization using API keys of using OAuth access.
Mobile app
Manage the CRM, make & receive calls and texts, and review reports on the go. Available for iOS & Android.
AI Lead Summaries
Get caught up on a lead quickly with an AI generated summary of key activities on the lead.
Custom Fields
Customize Close to store data unique to your business on Leads, Contacts, and Opportunities.
250
250
250
250
Custom Objects
Create your own unique CRM objects to store and associate with Leads in Close.
Custom Activities
Create your own unique templates that record activities specific to your sales process.
250
250
Custom Activity instances
Limits on the number of custom activity stored monthly.
50,000 / month
50,000 / month
AI Enrich
Enrichment is charged based on usage. Your free trial includes $5 of calling and enrichment credits.
Additional organizations
Growth and Scale customers receive 1 free secondary org. All customers can purchase additional orgs.
$50/month extra
$50/month extra
1 free + $50/month / additional
1 free + $50/month / additional
Email
Two-way email sync (send/receive)
See emails in Close and your external email client, no matter where the email was sent from.
Historical email import
Import past email communication with your Leads to keep and share historical context.
Email templates
Emails that can be reused to save time. They can be used to send individual emails or in bulk emails.
Snippets
Reusable blocks of text, like frequently used sentences or paragraphs, that you can easily insert into emails.
Dynamic template tags
Personalize emails by including tags into your email templates (e.g. ‘first name’) and have them populated automatically.
Connected accounts
Connect multiple email accounts within your Close account, such as a personal email and a sales email.
3
3
10
10
Send bulk email
Send a templated email to multiple contacts at once.
Email open tracking
See if your contact has opened your email before following up.
Sending limits
Prevent your email accounts from exceeding the sending thresholds set by your email providers to safeguard your sender reputation.
Unsubscribe
Manage email unsubscribers directly within Close.
Email scheduling
Schedule emails to send at a future date/time.
AI Email Rewrite
Use AI to draft and edit emails directly within Close
Send As
Let users send emails on your behalf.
Email and domain filtering
Automatically filter out any intra-organization emails, selected external email addresses, or domains by request.
Calling & SMS
Chloe (AI sales agent)
Calls, qualifies, books, and follows up automatically.
Free in Beta
Free in Beta
Make/receive calls worldwide within Close
Calling is charged based on usage. Your free trial includes $5 of calling and enrichment credits.
Automatic call logging
After a call is completed in Close, it will be automatically added to the Lead page (including time and duration).
Customizable call outcomes
Get accurate answer and conversion rate reports when reps log call outcomes.
Custom voicemail greeting
Call recordings
When enabled, calls completed through Close will be recorded and can be replayed directly on the Lead page.
30-day retention
30-day retention
90 Days
Unlimited
Premium Phone Numbers
Upgrade to business phone capabilities with lead-based call routing, customizable phone menu (IVR), and round-robin routing to sales reps. $19/month per line.
$19/month per line
$19/month per line
$19/month per line
$19/month per line
Call Assistant
Record, summarize, and transcribe calls synced to Close. Add-on cost is $50 per month, per organization, plus a usage fee of $.02 per minute.
$50/month + usage
$50/month + usage
$50/month + usage
$50/month + usage
Voicemail Drop
Click to leave a pre-recorded voicemail.
Send/receive text messages within Close
Close supports SMS sending to over a dozen countries, including the US, CA, GB, and AU. Note: A2P 10DLC registration is required for sending SMS to US phone numbers.
SMS templates
Reusable blocks of text, like frequently used sentences or paragraphs, that you can easily insert into text templates.
Text scheduling
Draft and schedule texts to send at a later time or date.
Use text messages in automated workflows
Include SMS/MMS.
Power Dialer
Automatically call through any list of contacts without touching your keyboard or mouse.
Bring your own phone line, or rent a line from Close
Lines with Close starting at $1/line/month.
Group numbers
Use a shared inbound phone number that, when dialed, rings a group of phones simultaneously, stopping when any one of them is picked up.
Call forwarding
Redirect incoming calls to another phone number.
Standard call transferring
Predictive Dialer
Built-in calling automation software that allows your team to dial multiple numbers at once and get automatically connected once someone picks up.
Listen Call Coaching
Listen to in-progress calls for your team
Whisper Call Coaching
Coach the salesperson without the lead hearing.
Barge Call Coaching
Jump into a call with your salesperson and lead.
Automated Workflows
Automate outreach (SMS, emails, calls)
Trigger SMS, email, and call follow-up when Leads hit a certain criteria.
Update the CRM
Enrich Leads using AI, update Leads, or create Opportunities using Workflows.
Assign leads and follow-up tasks
Automatically assign Leads and set follow up tasks for yourself or your teammates.
Blackout Dates
Prevent automated email and SMS messages from being sent on certain holidays or when your team is unavailable.
Meetings + Scheduling
Calendar sync
Join and track meetings from within Close. Supports Google Calendar and Microsoft Outlook.
Meeting reminders
Close will automatically remind you about upcoming meetings.
Meeting Notetaker
Record, transcribe, and summarize all meetings synced to Close from Zoom, Teams, and Meet.
Customizable meeting outcomes
Get accurate connect and conversion rate reports when reps log meeting outcomes.
Collaboration + Admin Tools
Mentions
@mention users and groups to alert and collaborate with coworkers.
Comments
Add comment directly on activities and objects in Close to keep discussions about your contacts all in one place.
Roles and permissions
Control a user's accessibility within Close by assigning them to one of four predefined roles. On Scale only, create a custom role with unique permissions.
Customizable
Lead visibility settings
Control which leads different users can see.
User groups
Organize your team into up to 100 groups of up to 100 users each for faster reporting.
Required Fields (Currently Custom Activities Only)
Field Editing restrictions
Reporting
Activity reports and dashboards
See all of your team's activity (calls, emails, won deals, etc.), updated in real-time.
Opportunity Funnel Report
Analyze your Pipeline health with KPIs like conversion rates, time to close, and sales velocity.
Email template performance reports
Workflow Performance Report
Analyze the effectiveness of your email, call, and SMS Workflows.
Custom Graphs (Explorer)
Create Custom Graphs for more advanced reporting.
Leaderboard
Rank and compare Users for metrics that matter within a specified timeframe.
Integrations
Claude
Use Claude to research leads, summarize customer interactions, generate reports, and build workflows.
ChatGPT
Pull reports, research leads, summarize history, and build workflows with ChatGPT + Close.
Zoom
Join Zoom meetings and watch past recordings directly within Close.
Segment
Create or update Leads and Contacts with Close as a Segment Destination.
Zapier
Connect with 2000+ third-party apps through Zapier.
Calendly
Sync you and your team’s Calendly links with Close and insert them into emails with 1-click
Over 100 apps integrate with Close.
See all integrations
Support
24/7 Knowledge Base
Get answers to your technical questions.
Email support
Connect with our support team via email.
Security
SOC2 Type 2 Compliant
Close securely manages your data to protect the interests and privacy of your organization.
Two-factor authentication
Add additional security with 2FA.
Google SSO
Sign up and log in to Close using your authenticated Google account.
Work faster and smarter
with plan add-ons
Premium Phone Numbers
Need a phone number? We’ve got you covered with Premium Phone Numbers.
Lead-based call routing:
Route inbound calls to the right rep.
Personalized phone menu:
Interactive Voice Response (IVR) lets you direct callers with a custom greeting.
Round-robin routing:
Distribute calls fairly across your team.
$19
/ month
Per phone line (plus usage)
AI Call Assistant
Never take call notes again. We (and AI) will take it from here.
Automatic transcriptions:
Clear, searchable call transcripts (in any language).
Summarize

changelog.text:
Product Updates from Close CRM
Product
CRM
Lead Management
Proactively organize, prioritize, and route more leads to close deals faster
Power Dialer & Calling
Built-in power dialer, VoIP, email, and SMS. Call and connect more leads without switching tools. No integrations.
Sales Automation
Automate follow-ups, qualifying sequences, task creation, and lead routing.
Reporting & Coaching

Because action matters: Close is the only sales CRM that doesn't just store your data, it acts on it with calling, email, and AI automation built in.

Sales Playmaker
Product Tour
Partner with Close
Developers
About
Login
Demo
Try Close
Product Updates
If you’re a tech-enabled team who needs to scale without overpaying for enterprise sales software, you’ve found the right sales tool.
April 30, 2026
New Feature
ChatGPT app
‍
Close's official ChatGPT app is now available
. Whether you need to generate a custom report, research and create a new lead list, get a summary of recent interactions with a customer, or create new Workflows - all you have to do is ask ChatGPT to take care of it for you.
March 18, 2026
New Feature
Call Tasks
‍
‍
You can assign Call Tasks to yourself or a member of the team as a reminder to a call a Contact at a specific date and time. Call Tasks are similar and appear on Leads and the Inbox in the same place as
Tasks
, but there are a few differences:
Call Tasks must have an associated Contact.
When created using Workflows (via the
Call step
), Call Tasks can be assigned to a Group.
Close will automatically mark Call Tasks complete when there is a Call between the associated Contact and an assigned User.
A Call activity between the associated Contact and assigned User is required in order to mark a Call Task complete.
To learn more about Call Tasks, check out the
Help Center.
March 6, 2026
New Feature
New in Smart Views: Instantly see the sum, average, and more for column data + New Opportunities List
You shouldn’t need a spreadsheet just to understand your own data. Now in Close, every search result and Smart View comes with instant column calculations: averages, sums, min/max, % empty, counts, and more. No downloads, no formulas, no context-switching. Just answers, right where the work happens. Open it to quickly add a calculation to the column. This info gets saved with the Smart View so anyone you share it with will see it too!
‍
As a bonus, we also shipped the reworked Opportunities List!
The new list view has many new features, such as:
Advanced Filtering
Report Saving
In-column Calculations
Column Sorting
Column Resizing
Column Drag and Drop
‍
It's replacing the old Opportunities List (which is still accessible via the banner link on the new list page).
‍
‍
February 28, 2026
Improvements
February Improvements
What’s New
Workflows
We added a "View Run" option to the Workflow subscription details modal, allowing you to navigate directly to the run details.
Workflow step assignment fields (Send from / Assign To) no longer require the "Manage Organization" or admin permissions. They are now controlled by the same workflow-level permission as all other fields.
When manually triggering a Workflow, the drop down now shows an icon indicating the workflow's type (lead, contact, etc.).
‍
Other
We added a new checkout page for trials and new Call Assistant checkout flow.
Users can now edit their voicemail drop recording when an invalid audio file was previously uploaded.
Filter group titles now show a type indicator (e.g., "Custom Activity", "Custom Object", "Form Submission") after the entity name to help distinguish between different entity types when filtering.
AI Enrich ✨ icon is now unified across usage.
‍
‍
February 6, 2026
New Feature
New in Workflows: Ignore the Communication Schedule and Blackout Dates on communication steps
Email, SMS, and Call steps have a new "Ignore Workflow's Communication Schedule and Blackout Dates" checkbox.
When checked, the step will process immediately and ignore the Communication Schedule and Blackout Dates configured on the Workflow.
On Call steps, the Call Task due date will be set to the time the Workflow step was processed.
This is great for situations where you want an SMS, email, or call to happen immediately after the Workflow is triggered, regardless of what day/time it is, and have the rest of the Workflow steps follow a traditional schedule.
‍
January 31, 2026
Improvements
January Improvements
What’s New
Telephony
Call hangup should no longer fail in the legacy call bars.
We added Costa Rica to the list of countries for which users can rent phone numbers.
Calls that cannot be coached will no longer show the “Listen” button incorrectly.
‍
Conversations
We added a “Date Range” filter on the Conversations page.
Call activities with a voicemail drop will now show the media player, allowing the voicemail to be played.
‍
Workflows
Workflow Update Lead/Opportunity steps now display an error when attempting to save without any fields configured.
‍
Inbox
You can now undo sending an email from the Inbox using the success toast.
‍
Other
The Account Disconnected banner now only appears when the erroring feature is enabled on the account.
‍
January 16, 2026
New Feature
Automate Lead capture with our new Forms
‍
We're excited to announce Close Forms is now available to all customers on all plans.
Close Forms is our native web form builder that lets you capture and route website leads directly into Close. No Zapier or third-party tools required.
‍
What you can do:
Build custom forms with a drag-and-drop builder (no coding needed)
Embed forms on your website to capture leads instantly
Route leads automatically into Close with clean CRM data
Prevent spam with built-in protection
Track form activity right on the lead page
Filter and search form submissions with Smart Views
Get notified when new leads come in
‍
Why it matters:
Forms eliminates setup friction for new teams and reduces your dependency on external tools. Whether you're a new trial user looking to see leads flow quickly or an established team consolidating your tech stack, Forms helps you get leads into Close faster so your team can follow up sooner.
‍
Get started: Head to the Forms section in your Close account settings to create your first form.
‍
Check out our Support docs for more information.
‍
December 31, 2025
Improvements
December Improvements
What’s New
We refreshed the UI of our Import page and plan tiles in Billing.
The Snooze menu in the Inbox will no longer show Today as an option unless using the Future view.
We fixed a bug, and the call hangup should no longer fail in the new call bars.
We added a "Manage Blackout Dates..." option to the Blackout Date selector input in Workflows.
‍
December 18, 2025
New Feature
New in Workflows: Update Opportunity step
The new "Update Opportunity" step
in Workflows can update any selected fields on an existing Opportunity. This works great for:
Updating an Opportunity's confidence percentage or Custom Fields fields when the status changes.
Updating an Opportunity's status when an event occurs on the Lead or a Custom Activity is published.
Changing the owner of an Opportunity when the Lead gets assigned to another user.
December 16, 2025
New Feature
Dive deep into your call data with our new Calls Report
We just launched a brand new report that's overflowing with great insights about your team's call activity. In addition to a quick look at call volume over time, you can get breakdowns of calls by duration and disposition so you can understand if your calls are being answered and how many substantive conversations are happening vs. quick hangups. Additionally, you'll find a chart showing the total leads dialed vs. unique leads dialed, and the count of each type of outcome set on your calls.
You can filter the report by Smart View, User, Direction, Duration, Outcome, and, by popular demand, phone number.
Learn more about automating Email using Workflows in Close's
Help Center
.
‍
December 4, 2025
New Feature
Automatically create email drafts using Workflows
‍
A new "Create draft for review" option has been added to the Email step in Workflows.
When selected, the email on the Workflow step will be created as a draft and placed in the assigned user's Inbox to review, edit, and send as they see fit.
‍
Learn more about automating Email using Workflows in Close's
Help Center
.
‍
December 1, 2025
Improvements
November Improvements
What’s New
Workflows
You can now use the variable menu to reference trigger data in your Task descriptions.
‍
Email
When composing an email, you can now press "Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+Enter" and it will open the Schedule popup.
The option to add unsubscribe links is no longer found on email templates for unsupported plans, and templates will not add unsubscribe links for unsupported plans. Unsubscribing via an unsubscribe link will now work for all plans.
Better handling of mailto: email address links inside the content of emails.
‍
Custom Fields
Users will now be able to configure custom fields to be always visible - even when empty.
Users will now be able to test AI Enrich directly from the custom field settings.
‍
AI Enrich
Users will now be able to use AI Enrich on a Contact Title.
Users can now run bulk enrich for Contact Titles.
Users will now see a warning banner explaining the AI Enrich cost usage when enrolling workflows that use AI Enrich.
November 12, 2025
New Feature
New in Workflows: Blackout Dates
Add Blackout Date calendars to Workflows to prevent automated email and SMS messages from being sent on certain holidays or days when your team is unable to respond.
‍
How it Works:
Create calendars to prevent automated email and SMS messages in Workflows from being sent on certain days (holidays, vacation, etc).
Multiple Blackout Date calendars can be applied to a Workflow via the "Recipient & Schedule" modal.
Update multiple Workflows at once by selecting one or more Workflows and clicking "Set Blackout Dates" from the Workflows list.
‍
Learn more about Workflows and Blackout Dates in the
Help Center
.
November 4, 2025
New Feature
New! See Activities in Search Results
When you search, you will now see the five most recent matching Activities. Clicking a result will take you to the Lead page with that Activity open in full screen view. If you're looking for more powerful Activity searching, check out our
new Activity Smart Views
.
‍
October 30, 2025
Improvements
October Improvements
What’s New
Workflows
All workflows now display a hint showing whether they run once per contact or every time they're triggered, based on your workflow configuration.
Workflows now stay on the edit screen after saving, making it easier to make multiple changes. After creating a new workflow, you will be redirected to the workflow detail page.
Workflow search now consistently finds results using partial word matching.
We updated the workflow task icon to help differentiate from a completed workflow step.
We fixed a bug where pressing Cmd+Enter on macOS and Ctrl+Enter on Windows while editing workflow steps may cause unexpected updates to the workflow.
‍
Telephony
Users will see improved error messages when microphone access is denied or unavailable.
The phone popover now allows reconnecting to the calling service to resolve errors
October 17, 2025
New Feature
New! Create and Share Activity Smart Views
You can now make Smart Views of various types of Activities from your team: Calls, Emails, SMS messages, WhatsApp messages, Meetings, Notes, and Custom Activities. This unlocks a ton of new use cases, from monitoring your team’s weekly activity to making a list of calls where the transcript mentioned a particular topic.
Just like with other Smart Views, you can customize your columns, apply filters, and share them with your team.
‍
Choose a type of Activity to create your Smart View
‍
This feature is available now on all plans. Try it out and let us know what you think!
September 30, 2025
Improvements
September Improvements
What’s New
Permissions: Granular control for Custom Objects and Custom Activities
We’ve added more precise role permissions for Custom Objects and Custom Activities. Admins can set separate rights to add, edit, and delete, giving teams tighter control without slowing down daily work.
Add, Edit, and Delete are now distinct permissions you can assign per role for both Custom Objects and Custom Activities. Existing restrictions carry over, so users keep their current access; you can add finer granularity as needed.
Set granular permission

integrations.title: CRM Integrations for Close CRM | Native and No-Code
integrations.text:
CRM Integrations for Close CRM | Native and No-Code
Product
CRM
Lead Management
Proactively organize, prioritize, and route more leads to close deals faster
Power Dialer & Calling
Built-in power dialer, VoIP, email, and SMS. Call and connect more leads without switching tools. No integrations.
Sales Automation
Automate follow-ups, qualifying sequences, task creation, and lead routing.
Reporting & Coaching
Sales dashboards, leaderboards, and call coaching to improve rep performance
Get Started
Platform Overview
Because action matters: Close is the only sales CRM that doesn't just store your data, it acts on it with calling, email, and AI automation built in.
Customer Stories
See how small businesses and scaling teams grow revenue with Close
Integrations
100+ native, no-code, and Zapier integrations to fit your stack and work the way you want

hits.title: Apollo will close down on June 30th
Zoom closes account of U.S.-based Chinese activist after Tiananmen event
OpenAI is now everything it promised not to be: closed-source and for-profit
Tell HN: Slack decides to close down IRC and XMPP gateways
Twitter to employees: all office buildings closed, badge access suspended
Uber cuts 3000 more jobs, closes 45 offices

analysis.name: Close
analysis.tagline: This CRM calls your leads for you
analysis.value_proposition: Close is a sales CRM with built-in calling, email, SMS, and an AI sales agent (Chloe) that contacts, qualifies, and books leads automatically without rep intervention.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small-to-mid outbound sales teams doing high call volume who want a single platform replacing dialer + CRM + email tool

features.name: ai sales agent (chloe)
features.description: Autonomous AI agent that calls leads, qualifies through real conversations, books meetings, and updates the CRM automatically

features.name: ai call qualification
features.description: Chloe conducts real phone conversations to qualify inbound and cold leads without human reps

features.name: ai meeting booking
features.description: Chloe books meetings directly during qualification calls and routes to the right rep

features.name: ai call summarization
features.description: Generates complete AI summary of every lead pulling from calls, emails, and meetings with full transcripts and action items

features.name: ai follow-up drafting
features.description: Chloe prepares and sends follow-up messages based on call transcripts at the right time

features.name: ai lead enrichment
features.description: Fills contact fields with data insights sourced from LinkedIn and the web automatically

features.name: ai lead summaries
features.description: AI-generated summary of key activities on a lead for quick rep catch-up

features.name: ai email assistant
features.description: AI-powered email composition and assistance for reps

features.name: built-in voip calling
features.description: Native VoIP calling without external integrations, calls logged automatically

features.name: power dialer
features.description: Automated sequential dialing to increase call volume and connect rate

features.name: predictive dialer
features.description: AI-driven predictive dialing that calls multiple numbers simultaneously and connects reps when a human answers

features.name: call recording
features.description: Records calls for coaching and review; unlimited recording on Scale tier

features.name: voicemail drop
features.description: Pre-recorded voicemail drop during power dialing sessions; supports editing recording

features.name: call coaching
features.description: Tools for managers to review calls and coach reps on performance

features.name: call tasks
features.description: Assignable tasks tied to specific contacts with a required call to mark complete; auto-marks complete when call occurs

features.name: call transcript logging
features.description: Full call transcripts automatically logged to the CRM lead record

features.name: built-in sms
features.description: Native two-way SMS without external integrations

features.name: built-in email
features.description: Native email send/receive synced to lead records without external mail client

features.name: email sync
features.description: Two-way sync with external email providers (e.g., Gmail)

features.name: calendar sync
features.description: Sync meetings and reminders from Google Calendar into Close

features.name: dedicated email servers
features.description: Option to use dedicated email infrastructure for improved deliverability

features.name: lead management
features.description: Core lead object with contact associations, status tracking, and activity timeline

features.name: pipeline management
features.description: Visual opportunity pipeline with deal stage tracking and value calculation

features.name: multi-pipeline support
features.description: Create multiple pipelines for different teams, products, or sales processes

features.name: opportunity management
features.description: Track opportunities with total value and expected value; up to 300 per lead

features.name: pipeline guidance
features.description: Highlights stalled or at-risk deals and suggests next steps to keep them moving

features.name: smart views
features.description: Dynamic saved searches with advanced filtering; shareable across team members

features.name: smart views column calculations
features.description: Inline sum, average, min/max, % empty, and count calculations on any Smart View column; saved with the view

features.name: opportunities list view
features.description: Reworked opportunities list with advanced filtering, report saving, in-column calculations, column sorting, resizing, and drag-and-drop

features.name: task management
features.description: Assignable tasks for self and team members tied to leads and contacts

features.name: follow-up reminders
features.description: Set reminders to follow up with contacts at specified times

features.name: centralized inbox
features.description: Multi-channel inbox view centralizing tasks, emails, calls, and SMS across all leads

features.name: forms
features.description: No-code form builder to capture website leads directly into Close

features.name: lead routing
features.description: Automatically assign leads to the right rep based on rules

features.name: sales automation / workflows
features.description: Automated multi-step workflows for follow-ups, qualifying sequences, task creation, and lead routing

features.name: workflow communication schedule
features.description: Configure communication schedules and blackout dates on workflow email/SMS/call steps; option to ignore schedule for immediate sends

features.name: duplicate lead management
features.description: Duplicate detection on import with ability to merge duplicate leads

features.name: data import and export
features.description: Import from other CRMs or spreadsheets; export data out of Close

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Up to 250 custom fields on Leads, Contacts, and Opportunities

features.name: custom objects
features.description: Create unique CRM objects associated with Leads

features.name: custom activities
features.description: Custom activity templates to record sales-process-specific activities

features.name: role-based access control
features.description: Role-based permissions controlling what users can view and edit

features.name: lead visibility rules
features.description: Restrict which leads individual reps or groups can see

features.name: reporting and dashboards
features.description: Sales dashboards with activity and performance metrics

features.name: sales leaderboards
features.description: Team performance leaderboards for competitive visibility

features.name: lead and contact activity timeline
features.description: Chronological timeline of all activities on a lead or contact with filtering and search

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android app for CRM management, calling, texting, and reporting on the go

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Native desktop application for Mac/Windows

features.name: rest api
features.description: Full REST API with API key and OAuth access for custom integrations

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-based webhooks for real-time data push to external systems

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server enabling AI models/agents to access and act on Close data

features.name: chatgpt app integration
features.description: Official ChatGPT app to generate reports, research leads, get summaries, and create workflows via natural language

features.name: 2fa
features.description: Two-factor authentication for account security

features.name: bring your own carrier (byoc)
features.description: Connect your own telephony carrier instead of using Close's built-in VoIP

features.name: playbooks
features.description: Structured sales playbooks that integrate with Chloe for guided selling

features.name: compliance features
features.description: Calling and communication compliance controls

features.name: integration link
features.description: One-click jump to external websites/tools with lead, contact, and opportunity data passed securely via URL

features.name: zapier integration
features.description: No-code Zapier automation connecting Close to hundreds of third-party apps

features.name: roi calculator
features.description: Self-serve tool to estimate revenue impact of switching to Close

features.name: sales playmaker
features.description: Interactive tool to build a custom sales process for your team

features.name: lead scoring
features.description: Score and prioritize leads based on defined criteria

features.name: solo plan
features.description: Single-user plan with limited leads (10k) and no workflows, for individual salespeople

differentiators: The only sales CRM that doesn't just store your data, it acts on it — calling, email, and AI automation built in natively
Chloe AI sales agent is part of the CRM, not a separate tool or integration
Built-in dialer, SMS, and email require zero third-party integrations
CRM that updates itself: every conversation auto-logs transcripts, notes, and deal stage changes
MCP server enabling any AI model or agent to access and act on Close data
Chloe calls new leads within minutes of entering the pipeline, before a rep touches them

recent_ships.what: ChatGPT official app — generate reports, research leads, get summaries, create Workflows via natural language
recent_ships.source: Close's official ChatGPT app is now available. Whether you need to generate a custom report, research and create a new lead list, get a summary of recent interactions with a customer, or create new Workflows - all you have to do is ask ChatGPT to take care of it for you.

recent_ships.what: Call Tasks — assignable call reminders tied to contacts; auto-marked complete when call occurs; workflow-assignable to Groups
recent_ships.source: You can assign Call Tasks to yourself or a member of the team as a reminder to call a Contact at a specific date and time. Close will automatically mark Call Tasks complete when there is a Call between the associated Contact and an assigned User.

recent_ships.what: Smart Views column calculations (sum, average, min/max, % empty, count) + reworked Opportunities List with advanced filtering, report saving, column sorting/resizing/drag-and-drop
recent_ships.source: Now in Close, every search result and Smart View comes with instant column calculations: averages, sums, min/max, % empty, counts, and more. No downloads, no formulas, no context-switching.

recent_ships.what: Workflow step option to ignore Communication Schedule and Blackout Dates for immediate sends on email, SMS, and call steps
recent_ships.source: Email, SMS, and Call steps have a new 'Ignore Workflow's Communication Schedule and Blackout Dates' checkbox. When checked, the step will process immediately.

recent_ships.what: Workflow improvements: View Run navigation, relaxed assignment permissions, voicemail drop recording edit, filter group type indicators
recent_ships.source: We added a 'View Run' option to the Workflow subscription details modal. Users can now edit their voicemail drop recording when an invalid audio file was previously uploaded.

recent_ships.what: Telephony improvements including call hangup fix in legacy call bars and expanded country support (Costa Rica)
recent_ships.source: Call hangup should no longer fail in the legacy call bars. We added Costa Rica to t[elephony support].

"Chloe's pricing is dramatically cheaper than an SDR, with faster quality control and instant adjustability." — Jem Millett, Director of Admissions @ Flatiron School

"If you're worried your clients will be turned off by AI, don't be — it's just noise. Close and Chloe have done nothing but impact my bottom line in a positive way." — Ben Pace, President @ ClientMatchmaking.com
Changing Our CRM Platform To Close Is One Of The Best Decisions We Have Made. The Platform Does Everything We Need, And The Support Is Simply Outstanding. — Mike Corradini, CEO @ ProductMentor
Since We've Started Using Close, We've Quadrupled Our Average Revenue Per User. — Sara Archer, VP of Sales @ ChartMogul
